Queries.Name: DataTypes
Queries.Value: SELECT [ColumnVarcharNull] = CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(50)), [ColumnVarchar] = CAST('String' AS VARCHAR(50)), [ColumnBitNull] = CAST(NULL AS BIT), [ColumnBit] = CAST(1 AS BIT), [ColumnTinyIntNull] = CAST(NULL AS TINYINT), [ColumnTinyIntMin] = CAST(0 AS TINYINT), [ColumnTinyIntMax] = CAST(255 AS TINYINT), [ColumnSmallIntNull] = CAST(NULL AS SMALLINT), [ColumnSmallIntMin] = CAST(-32768 AS SMALLINT), [ColumnSmallIntMax] = CAST(32767 AS SMALLINT), [ColumnIntNull] = CAST(NULL AS INT), [ColumnIntMin] = CAST(-2147483648 AS INT), [ColumnIntMax] = CAST(2147483647 AS INT), [ColumnBigIntNull] = CAST(NULL AS BIGINT), [ColumnBigIntMin] = CAST(-9223372036854775808 AS BIGINT), [ColumnBigIntPrecisionMin] = CAST(-999999999999999 AS BIGINT), [ColumnBigIntPrecisionMax] = CAST(999999999999999 AS BIGINT), [ColumnBigIntMax] = CAST(9223372036854775807 AS BIGINT), [ColumnRealNull] = CAST(NULL AS REAL), [ColumnRealMin] = CAST('-3.40E+38' AS REAL), [ColumnRealMax] = CAST('3.40E+38' AS REAL), [ColumnFloatNull] = CAST(NULL AS FLOAT), [ColumnFloatMin] = CAST('-1.79E+308' AS FLOAT), [ColumnFloatMax] = CAST('1.79E+308' AS FLOAT), [ColumnDecimalNull] = CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(16,2)), [ColumnDecimalMin] = CAST(-9999999999999.99 AS DECIMAL(15,2)), [ColumnDecimalMax] = CAST(9999999999999.99 AS DECIMAL(15,2)), [ColumnDateNull] = CAST(NULL AS DATE), [ColumnDateMin] = CAST('1900-01-01' AS DATE), [ColumnDateMix] = CAST('9999-12-31' AS DATE), [ColumnUniqueIdentifierNull] = CAST(NULL AS UNIQUEIDENTIFIER), [ColumnUniqueIdentifier] = NEWID();

Queries.Name: Users
Queries.Value: SELECT U.* FROM [app].[Users] AS U INNER JOIN [app].[Tags] AS T ON (T.[Id] = U.[CreatedById]) WHERE T.[Name] = @SystemTagName;
